items.title: Alpha 200226
items.body:
🔄️ | Complete visual overhaul.
✅ | Added a pause menu.
✅ | Added a system for setting an NPCs name and role on first encounter.
✅ | Added a standalone .exe to launch the game.
✅ | Added a logging system using logs.txt for the .exe version.
✅ | Added a top bar displaying player statistics.

items.title: Alpha 110925
items.body:
🔄 Internal interaction page system overhaul.
🔄 Affection now reduces corruption difficulty. Higher Affection makes corruption easier.
🔄 Talk interactions now grant limited affection per corruption level.
🔄 Replacement of the LawsCorruption system with CityCorruption, blocking interactions when the NPC is outside and CityCorruption has not reached a required threshold.
✅ Added refresh in dialog pages.
✅ Several small changes to make the game more enjoyable and less grindy.
✅ Added the story tracking system.
✅ Added stripper scenes to the strip club.
🔄 Removed the daily limit on meditation.
✅ Added maximum energy increase via the Fitness attribute every 20 points.
🔄 Minor bug fixes.
✅ Added affection gain during sexual interactions.
✅ Added small details.
🔄 Main menu UI changes and multiple menu updates.
✅ Added Auto-Save system.
✅ Added interaction images for NPC Principal.
🔄 Corruption system rework.
✅ Added interaction images for NPC Classmate 1.
✅ Added interaction images for NPC Classmate 3.
✅ Added Cheat Menu.
🔄 Cheat Menu rework.
✅ Added Anti-Cheat system.
✅ Added interaction images for NPC Mayor and Classmate 2.
✅ Added the voting system at City Hall.
✅ Added story content with Dealer W.
🔄 Reworked The Pit spectator system.
✅ Added the Gift system.
🔄 Combat system rework.
✅ Added Medkit purchase and hospital healing.
🔄 Inventory system rework.
✅ Added The Pit area, scoreboard, betting and combat systems.
✅ Added interaction images for NPC BestFriend.
❌ Removed the Gift system.
✅ Re-added the Gift system.
✅ Added dialogues for remaining NPCs.
✅ Added drug dealing zones.
✅ Added interaction images for HousemateFemale and Landlady.
🔄 Redesigned the StoryCaption.
✅ Added drug dealing system with multiple drugs, areas and risk chances.
✅ Added Police and Hospital zones.
✅ Added drug purchasing system in the TrapHouse.
🔄 Added item sale descriptions.
✅ Initialized interaction pages for all NPCs.
✅ Added interaction menu images for HousemateFemale and Landlady.
✅ Added TV to LivingRoom.
✅ Added Sexshop NPC and new zones.
✅ Added interaction pages for all current NPCs.
🔄 Disabled certain interactions for non-trans or non-futa male NPCs.
✅ Added email warning messages.
✅ Added final College and CityHall areas.
✅ Placed NPCs in their zones.
🔄 Dialogue text and aesthetic changes.
🛠 Project creation phase including core systems, locations, mini-games, NPC interactions, stats, shops and early story implementation.
